caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," "what people do," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the connections and flow within this system. The background includes multiple browser tabs, hinting that the presentation might involve various resources or topics related to systems thinking, rural community food systems, and insights into societal futures. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, possibly a webinar or online seminar.
